title: Reflections | Did Iran Talks Fail Only Due To Nuke Distrust? | Sunanda K. Datta-Ray
description: At the same time, Mr Trump is on record as saying that last year’s US strikes “completely and totally obliterated” Iran’s nuclear facilities. Mr Vance was only slightly less specific. Claiming not to know the difference between “severely damaged versus obliterated”, he declared then that American bombing had set Iran’s “nuclear programme back substantially”
